raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tawi Laudis Katra
ees prettaaweem Eenaidneefeem/
us to Zeffu/ fur tu tohs fuhtiti/
un to KUNGII peeluhaas us scho
Zeffu prett scho Pilsfahtu/ ko tu
effi iswehlejs/ un prett scho
Naimmu / ko es tawam Wahr-
dam esmu pataifijs/"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbefis
winnu Luhgschanas/ un winnu
Sirds Saukschanas/ un nets
winneem to Teefu."
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tee prett tew buhs
apgrehkojchees/ (jo neweens Jil-
weks irr/ kas ne buhtu grehkojs/)
un tu pretti teem buhsi apskai-
tees/ un teem Eenaidneefeem tohs
nodohsi/ ka tee tohs Zeetuma no-
wedd Eenaidneefu Semmê/ lai
tahtu lai tuwu/"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee tai Semmê/ fur
tee Zeetuma irr westi to attaz
pee Sirds neims/ un atgreeesi-
jees/ un tewi peefanks sawa Zee-
tuma Semmê/ fazzidami: Mehs
effim grehkojchi/ un aplam dur-
rijfchi/ mehs effim besdeerwigi
bijufchi/"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee pee tewis at-
greeschahs no wiﬀas sawas
Sirds / un no wiﬀas sawas
Dwehjeles sawu Eenaidneefu
Semmê/ kas tohs Zeetuma buhs
niswedduchi / un tee tew pee-
lugas tai Zetta prett sawu Sem-
mi/ ko tu winnu Tehweem dewis/
prett to Pilsfahtu/ ko tu effi is-"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu Debbef
no tahs Weetas/ fur tu dshu-
winzu Luhgtschanu / un winnu
Sirds Saukschann / un ne-
winneem to Teefu/"
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un preedohd taweem La-
dim/ kas prett tew grehkojch-
un wiﬀahm winnu Pahrkahp-
fchanahm / ar ko tee prett te-
pahrkahpuschees/un parahditee-
Scheblastibu preekfch teem /
tohs Zeetuma turr/ ka tee pal-
winneem apschehlojahs."
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee irr tawi Laudie-
n tawa eemantojama Teefa-
ko tu no Egiptes/ no ta Dsel-
Zepta effi isweddig."
    },
    {
      "n": 52,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tawas Azzis atweh-
stahw us to Luhgschanu t-
wa Kalpa/ un us to Luhgscha-
nu tawu Israëta Lauschu/ ka-
tohs klausi eekfch wiﬀa/ pahr-
tee tew peefauz."
    },
    {
      "n": 53,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tu effi tohs tew pa-
weenu eemantojamu Teefu-
wiﬀeem Pasanles Laudim a-
schkthrees / ittin ka tu runna-
effi zaur tawu Kalpu Mohsu-
kad tu muhfus Tehwus no-
giptes-Semmes iswaddijs /
Kungs KUNGS!"
    },
    {
      "n": 54,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Salamans b-
pabeidsts to KUNGII peeluha-
ar wiﬀu tcho Luhgschanu u-
Sirds Saukschann/ tad zehlef-
wiﬀsch preekfch ta KUNGA A-
tara/ fur wiﬀsch bij Zettos ine-
tee"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
